query:
SELECT configKey, 
  CASE WHEN configValue = '' OR configValue IS NULL THEN '⚠️ EMPTY'
       ELSE CONCAT(LEFT(configValue,6), '...', RIGHT(configValue,4), ' (', LENGTH(configValue), ' chars)')
  END as preview,
  updatedAt
FROM platform_config 
WHERE configKey IN (
  'TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID','TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN','TWILIO_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID','TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER','TWILIO_TEST_MODE',
  'TWILIO_LIVE_ACCOUNT_SID','TWILIO_LIVE_AUTH_TOKEN','TWILIO_LIVE_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID','TWILIO_LIVE_FROM_NUMBER',
  'TWILIO_TEST_ACCOUNT_SID','TWILIO_TEST_AUTH_TOKEN','TWILIO_TEST_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID','TWILIO_TEST_FROM_NUMBER'
)
ORDER BY configKey;
command:

  CASE WHEN configValue = '' OR configValue IS NULL THEN '⚠️ EMPTY'
       ELSE CONCAT(LEFT(configValue,6), '...', RIGHT(configValue,4), ' (', LENGTH(configValue), ' chars)')
  END as preview,
  updatedAt
FROM platform_config 
WHERE configKey IN (
  'TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID','TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN','TWILIO_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID','TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER','TWILIO_TEST_MODE',
  'TWILIO_LIVE_ACCOUNT_SID','TWILIO_LIVE_AUTH_TOKEN','TWILIO_LIVE_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID','TWILIO_LIVE_FROM_NUMBER',
  'TWILIO_TEST_ACCOUNT_SID','TWILIO_TEST_AUTH_TOKEN','TWILIO_TEST_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID','TWILIO_TEST_FROM_NUMBER'
)
ORDER BY configKey;
